<features>
- observable feature: presence of multiple potholes in a line
- observable feature: surface is asphalt
- observable feature: white line visible on right side
</features>
<kb>
- IF [observable visual features = presence of multiple potholes in a line AND surface is asphalt] THEN [32]
- IF [observable visual features = uniform texture with fine grid pattern] THEN [8]
- IF [observable visual features = green surface with brownish bumps] THEN [4]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image shows multiple potholes in a line on an asphalt surface, matching the condition for class 32.
</rule_check>
<response>32</response>
